channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Republicans Push to Pass Funding Bill for ICE and Border Patrol Amidst Growing Divisions
item.description: Republicans are working quickly to pass a funding bill for Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) after a prolonged shutdown of the Department of Homeland Se...

item.title: Rivers State Government Supports Youth Empowerment and Advocates Transformational Leadership Policies
item.description: Rivers State Government don yan say dem go support any programme wey fit empower youths both socially and economically. Dis statement come from the Permanent Secretary of Rivers State Ministry of Yout...

item.title: Australians to face cost-of-living pressures as inflation rises
item.description: Australians are facing significant financial pressures in the first half of 2026, with a forecasted dip in living standards. Economists predict real household income per person will decrease by about ...

item.title: Key updates from Assembly elections across five Indian states on April 6, 2026
item.description: On April 6, 2026, assembly election activities intensified across several Indian states—Kerala, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, Puducherry, and Assam. Prime Minister Narendra Modi is set to address three maj...

item.title: Trump warns Iran as U.S. confirms rescue of missing airman in tense regional standoff
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump delivered a strongly worded threat against Iran following the successful rescue of a missing American fighter pilot. According to reports, the U.S. military conducte...

item.title: Congress unveils Puducherry manifesto promising jobs, women's welfare and full statehood
item.description: The Congress party has unveiled its election manifesto for Puducherry ahead of the assembly polls, presenting a wide-ranging plan focused on employment, social welfare, and governance reforms. The man...

item.title: How Canadian Self-Employed Workers Can Effectively Manage Tax Instalments
item.description: As the April 30, 2026, tax filing deadline approaches, many self-employed Canadians are facing the challenge of organizing their quarterly tax instalment payments. Anyone who owes more than $3,000 in ...

item.title: Easter road fatalities drop by 18% thanks to intensified law enforcement
item.description: Transport Minister Barbara Creecy has reported a notable reduction in road fatalities during the Easter long weekend, with 291 deaths recorded, down from 356 in the same period last year, representing...

item.title: How Ancient Greeks and Romans Coped with Despair Over World Affairs
item.description: If you're feeling disillusioned with the state of the world, you're not alone. For millennia, people have expressed frustration with issues like violence, poverty, and political turmoil. Ancient Greek...

item.description: Several senior officials in Kenya's energy sector, including former Petroleum PS Mohamed Liban, ex-Kenya Pipeline Company MD Joe Sang, and ex-Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority DG Daniel Kiptoo...

item.title: Hawthorn defeat Geelong by one point in epic Easter Monday clash at the MCG
item.description: Hawthorn secured a dramatic one-point win over Geelong in a breathtaking Easter Monday AFL clash at the MCG. In front of a roaring crowd of more than 84,000, the Hawks broke a five-game losing streak ...

item.title: Three Pakistanis hurt in UAE port debris fall, Pakistan ensures support and urges calm
item.description: Three Pakistani citizens were injured when debris from a projectile intercepted by UAE’s air defence systems fell at Khor Fakkan Port in Sharjah. The Sharjah Government Media Bureau confirmed that a f...

item.title: Professor Chijoriga Advocates Mindset Reset for Tanzanian Youth Inspired by TANU Youth Legacy
item.description: Professor Marcellina Chijoriga, Principal of the Mwalimu Nyerere Leadership School, is calling for a national mindset reset among Tanzania's youth. She draws inspiration from the legacy of the TANU Yo...

item.title: 14-Year-Old Student Dies After Being Hit by Stray Bullet in Maiduguri

item.description: Researchers at Tufts University’s School of Engineering have unveiled a new artificial intelligence model that could drastically reduce the energy consumption of AI systems while improving their accur...

item.title: 300-Year-Old Cannon Found During Excavation in Kingston upon Hull
item.description: During routine construction work in Kingston upon Hull, United Kingdom, workers uncovered a 300-year-old cast-iron cannon, an artifact that surprised archaeologists and local officials. The cannon, me...

item.title: Canberra United to play Anzac Day elimination final amid uncertain future
item.description: Canberra United will host Melbourne Victory in an A-League Women elimination final at McKellar Park on Anzac Day. The outcome of this match is crucial not only for the team's progression in the finals...

item.title: Pakistan Mediates Plan for Iran-US Ceasefire and Broader Peace Agreement
item.description: Pakistan has reportedly formulated a framework aimed at ending hostilities between Iran and the United States. The proposed 'Islamabad Accord' includes a two-step approach: an immediate ceasefire foll...

item.title: Limpopo police arrest 1,023 suspects in Easter crime crackdown
item.description: More than a thousand people were arrested in Limpopo during a large-scale police operation conducted over the Easter holidays. According to Colonel Malesela Ledwaba, spokesperson for the Limpopo SAPS,...

item.title: Trump's war on Iran enters sixth week due to fundamental misreading of the regime
item.description: Guardian columnist Nesrine Malik argues that Donald Trump's military campaign against Iran has extended into its sixth week because he fundamentally fails to understand the Iranian regime. What was ad...
